publishedAbstract: The `noobaa-db-pg-0` pod fails to start because it does not have the permission to initialize the database due to picking up the wrong SCC. ~~~ state: waiting: message: back-off 1m20s restarting failed container=initialize-database pod=noobaa-db-pg-0_openshift-storage(4fdc3a96-48a7-4d35-ab3f-e3a35659f8bb) reason: CrashLoopBackOff phase: Pending ~~~
publishedTitle: noobaa-db-pg-0 Pod Fails to Start CrashLoopBackOff (CLBO) - "failed container=initialize-database" Wrong SCC
